subject.name: Open leather-bound charter ledger with brass wax-seal stamp and fountain pen

physical_properties.primary_element: aged oxblood leather-bound charter ledger lying open at a slight angle on a dark walnut table, cream-colored aged pages with faint ruled lines (no readable text)
physical_properties.secondary_element: heavy tarnished brass wax-seal stamp resting on the corner of the open page, beside a single deep-red wax seal pressed into the paper
physical_properties.tertiary_element: vintage black-and-gold fountain pen at rest on the page, nib reflecting the warm key light

foreground.notes: positioned on the rule-of-thirds intersection so upper-left two-thirds remain clean for overlay text; ledger open at a slight angle, deep-red wax seal visible on the right page (purely decorative, no readable text), gold-foil edge of the cover catching the key light
heavy tarnished brass wax-seal stamp resting on the ledger's corner, handle facing the camera at a low angle, the working face emblem stylized and abstract (no recognizable logo or text)
black-and-gold barrel fountain pen laid at rest across the ledger page, gold nib catching a small specular highlight

midground.notes: single ornate tarnished brass key resting on a small burgundy velvet pad, cropped at frame edge, out of focus; suggests entry, charter, provenance

background.notes: rows of leather-spined ledgers receding into shadow on a dark wooden shelf, gold foil bands on the spines catching the warm light into a soft bokeh pattern, no readable titles
deep mahogany or walnut paneling, vertical grain, mostly in deep shadow with one warm light pool on the upper-left for text legibility
very subtle volumetric haze across the frame reading as old-library dust rather than smoke, catches the key light into soft god-rays without obscuring detail

surface.description: aged dark walnut tabletop with subtle ring-stain patina and a soft satin sheen, not glossy; conveys a long-used private-library writing desk

background.negative_space_zone: upper_left_to_center — keep visually quiet for overlay text

atmosphere.mood: secret society, private library, old-money provenance, reserved and ceremonial; slightly more authoritative and less smoky than the cigar scene while still warm

camera.composition_notes: rule of thirds — subject locked to lower-right intersection; upper-left two-thirds reserved for event title overlay

lighting.key_light_quality: warm tungsten ~2700K, soft falloff, motivated by an unseen banker's desk lamp; rakes across the ledger page to bring out paper grain and the wax seal's relief
lighting.rim_light_notes: subtle warm rim on the brass wax-seal stamp, the fountain-pen barrel, and the ledger's gold-foil edge to separate them from the deep shadow background
lighting.practical_lights: distant out-of-focus warm bokeh points in deep background (suggesting library reading lamps / candles), with a slightly more restrained, authoritative spacing than the cigar scene

brand.palette_intent: warm gold and burgundy accents on near-black warm base, matching Lounge & Co. design tokens; burgundy emphasis via the wax seal and velvet pad

controls.render_intent: photoreal, shot on medium-format, low ISO, fine grain
